capabilities.name: utility-first
capabilities.description: Use Tailwind utility classes; avoid long @apply chains; avoid inline styles for values Tailwind can express (e.g. use w-4 h-4 not style)

capabilities.name: theme-tokens
capabilities.description: Use theme values (e.g. rounded-lg, text-sm, bg-gray-100) instead of arbitrary values unless design requires one-off
api_elements: avoid arbitrary values for repeated patterns

capabilities.name: responsive
capabilities.description: Mobile-first responsive design using sm:, md:, lg: prefixes; base classes for smallest viewport

capabilities.name: interaction-states
capabilities.description: Apply hover, focus, and disabled states with Tailwind classes (hover:, focus:, focus-visible:, disabled:) for interactive elements

capabilities.name: dark-mode
capabilities.description: Use dark: prefix for backgrounds and text when supporting dark mode

capabilities.name: config
capabilities.description: Extend theme in tailwind.config (e.g. theme.extend.colors); ensure content includes template/component paths
